Resource generation classes, license management, Waf tools, initialization, filename finder, and redesign plan.

## Folders
- **[resource_map](resource_map/README.md)**: Resource generation classes and methods for Pebble firmware, including bitmap, font, JS, PBI, PDC, PNG, raw, and vibe resources.
- **[types](types/README.md)**: License information and classes for managing firmware resources, declarations, definitions, and objects.
- **[waftools](waftools/README.md)**: Tools for generating C byte arrays, font headers, pbpack files, PFS resources, resource balls, resource ID headers, timeline resources, and version headers using Waf in Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Initialization file for the `pebble-firmware/tools/resources` package.
- **[find_resource_filename.py](find_resource_filename.py.md)**: Finds the most specific resource filename based on platform-specific tags and general filename.
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Redesign plan for resource generation to improve modularity and independence from SDK and Firmware.
